message.content:
```plaintext
@startuml
title Registracija uporabnika

actor "Uporabnik" as User
boundary "ZMRegistracijskiObrazec" as RegistrationForm
control "KrmilnikRegistracija" as RegistrationController
entity "Uporabnik" as UserEntity
boundary "ZMDomačaStran" as HomeScreen

User -> RegistrationForm: Vnesi podatke
activate RegistrationForm
RegistrationForm -> RegistrationController: Pošlji podatke za registracijo
activate RegistrationController
RegistrationController -> UserEntity: Shrani novega uporabnika
activate UserEntity
UserEntity --> RegistrationController: Potrditev shranitve
deactivate UserEntity
RegistrationController --> RegistrationForm: Odgovor o uspešnosti
deactivate RegistrationController
RegistrationForm --> User: Prikaži rezultat
deactivate RegistrationForm
User --> HomeScreen: Preusmeri na domačo stran
activate HomeScreen
HomeScreen --> User: Prikaži vsebino
deactivate HomeScreen

@enduml
```
